---
title: "Open Source Projects"
pagetitle: "Projects | Anthony Faustine"
description-meta: "Open-source ML libraries for forecasting, load monitoring, and production machine learning systems."

format:
  html:
    body-class: "projects"
    page-layout: full

toc: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(yaml)
projects_data <- yaml::read_yaml("data.yml")
num_projects <- length(projects_data$projects)
```

```{r circular-timeline, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
# Generate complete HTML with embedded CSS for circular timeline
html_output <- '
<style>
input[type="radio"] {
  position: absolute;
  width: 1px;
  height: 1px;
  padding: 0;
  margin: -1px;
  overflow: hidden;
  clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
  white-space: nowrap;
  border-width: 0;
}

.projects-timeline {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 2rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8f9fa 100%);
}

.timeline-header {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 4rem;
}

.timeline-header h1 {
  font-size: 2.5rem;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #222;
}

.timeline-header p {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #666;
  margin: 0;
}

.cards-container {
  --base-rotation: 0deg;
  --full-circle: 360deg;
  --radius: 35vw;
  --duration: 200ms;
  --cards-container-size: calc(var(--radius) * 2);
  --cards-container-padding: 2rem;
  --label-offset: calc(var(--radius) * -1 - 1rem);
  --label-size: 35px;
  --label-color: #888;
  --label-color-hover: #2196F3;
  --label-line-h: 0;
  --label-line-h-current: 2rem;
  --label-dot-size: 12px;
  --title-top: 1.5rem;
  --title-offset-y: 30px;
  --info-top: 5rem;
  --info-width: min(80%, 600px);
  --info-offset-y: 30px;

  box-sizing: content-box;
  position: relative;
  margin: 0 auto;
  width: var(--cards-container-size);
  height: var(--cards-container-size);
  padding: var(--cards-container-padding);
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .cards-container {
    --radius: 40vw;
    --label-size: 30px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .cards-container {
    --radius: 45vw;
    --label-size: 24px;
    --label-dot-size: 8px;
    --label-offset: calc(var(--radius) * -1 - 0.5rem);
    --info-width: 90vw;
  }

  .timeline-header h1 {
    font-size: 1.8rem;
  }
}

.cards {
  position: absolute;
  inset: var(--cards-container-padding);
  aspect-ratio: 1;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
  list-style: none;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) var(--duration);
}

.cards li {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  transform-origin: center;
  display: grid;
  place-content: center;
  transform: rotate(calc(var(--i) * 360deg / var(--items)));
  pointer-events: none;
}

.cards li > label {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  margin: auto;
  transform: translateY(var(--label-offset));
  width: var(--label-size);
  height: var(--label-size);
  cursor: pointer;
  pointer-events: initial;
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--label-color);
  font-size: clamp(0.75rem, 2vw, 1.1rem);
  font-weight: 600;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: color var(--duration) ease-in-out;
}

.cards li > label::before {
  content: \'\';
  position: absolute;
  top: var(--cards-container-padding);
  left: 50%;
  translate: -50% 0;
  width: var(--label-dot-size);
  height: var(--label-dot-size);
  border-radius: 50%;
  background-color: var(--label-color);
  transition: background-color var(--duration) ease-in-out;
}

.cards li > label::after {
  content: \'\';
  position: absolute;
  top: 100%;
  left: 50%;
  translate: -50% 5px;
  width: 2px;
  height: var(--label-line-h);
  background-color: #2196F3;
  transition: height 300ms ease-in-out var(--label-line-delay, 0ms);
}

.cards li > label:hover {
  color: var(--label-color-hover);
}

.cards li > label:hover::before {
  background-color: var(--label-color-hover);
}

.cards > li > h2,
.cards > li > p {
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  text-align: center;
  transform: translate(-50%, 0);
  transform-origin: center;
  margin: 0;
  width: var(--info-width);
}

.cards > li > h2 {
  top: var(--title-top);
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 2.5rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #222;
  opacity: var(--title-opacity, 0);
  translate: 0 var(--title-offset-y);
  transition: var(--duration) ease-in-out var(--title-delay, 0ms);
}

.cards > li > p {
  top: var(--info-top);
  font-size: clamp(0.85rem, 1.5vw, 0.95rem);
  color: #555;
  line-height: 1.6;
  text-align: center;
  opacity: var(--info-opacity, 0);
  translate: 0 var(--info-offset-y);
  transition: var(--duration) ease-in-out var(--info-delay, 0ms);
  z-index: 10;
}

.cards > li > p a {
  color: #2196F3;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.cards > li > p a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

li:has(input:checked) {
  --label-opacity: 1;
  --label-color: #2196F3;
  --label-line-h: var(--label-line-h-current);
  --label-line-delay: calc(var(--duration) * 2);
  --title-opacity: 1;
  --title-offset-y: 0;
  --title-delay: calc(var(--duration) * 3);
  --info-opacity: 1;
  --info-offset-y: 0;
  --info-delay: calc(var(--duration) * 4);
}

.cards:has(input:checked) {
  transform: rotate(calc(var(--base-rotation) - (var(--index) * var(--full-circle) / var(--items))));
}

.cards:has(li:nth-child(1) > input:checked) { --index: 0; }
.cards:has(li:nth-child(2) > input:checked) { --index: 1; }
.cards:has(li:nth-child(3) > input:checked) { --index: 2; }
.cards:has(li:nth-child(4) > input:checked) { --index: 3; }
.cards:has(li:nth-child(5) > input:checked) { --index: 4; }

.timeline-info {
  margin-top: 3rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.timeline-hint {
  color: #999;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  margin: 0;
  font-weight: 500;
}
</style>

<div class="projects-timeline">
  <div class="timeline-header">
    <h1>Open Source Projects</h1>
    <p>Production-grade ML libraries from research to enterprise</p>
  </div>

  <div class="cards-container">
'

html_output <- paste0(html_output, sprintf('    <ul class="cards" style="--items: %d;">\n', num_projects))

for (i in 1:num_projects) {
  proj <- projects_data$projects[[i]]
  idx <- i - 1
  checked <- if (i == 1) "checked" else ""

  html_output <- paste0(html_output, sprintf('      <li style="--i: %d;">\n', idx))
  html_output <- paste0(html_output, sprintf('        <input type="radio" id="item-%d" name="gallery-item" %s>\n', idx, checked))
  html_output <- paste0(html_output, sprintf('        <label for="item-%d">%d</label>\n', idx, proj$year))
  html_output <- paste0(html_output, sprintf('        <h2>%s</h2>\n', proj$name))

  desc <- sprintf('%s<br><br>', proj$description)
  desc <- paste0(desc, sprintf('<strong>Updated:</strong> %s<br>', proj$updated))

  desc <- paste0(desc, '<strong>Links:</strong> ')
  link_html <- sapply(proj$links, function(l) {
    sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener">%s</a>', l$url, l$label)
  })
  desc <- paste0(desc, paste(link_html, collapse=' • '))

  if (!is.null(proj$paper)) {
    desc <- paste0(desc, sprintf('<br><strong>Paper:</strong> <a href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener">%s</a>',
                                 proj$paper$url, proj$paper$title))
  }

  html_output <- paste0(html_output, sprintf('        <p>%s</p>\n', desc))
  html_output <- paste0(html_output, '      </li>\n')
}

html_output <- paste0(html_output, '
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-info">
    <p class="timeline-hint">Click a year to explore</p>
  </div>
</div>
')

cat(html_output)
```

---

## Contributing

These projects welcome contributions and collaboration.

[Open an Issue](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm} [Submit a PR](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
